bench_setup.notes: PLL1 full-speed clock self-test. HSI 64 MHz → PLL1 (PLLM=4, PLLN=50, PLLP=2) → SYSCLK=400 MHz. VOS1, Flash LATENCY=4/WRHIGHFREQ=2. D1HCLK=200 MHz (HPRE=/2), APB1=100 MHz (D2PPRE1=/2), TIM2 clock=200 MHz. Measures TIM2 ticks in 1 ms SysTick interval; expects 180000–220000 (~200000). On PASS: detail0 = measured TIM2 ticks per ms. No wiring required.
